sectionSubtitle: Three tiers designed for different levels of exchange participation — from passive market observation to full institutional trading with API access and custom settlement.
disclaimer: HeadyEx is a computational resource credit exchange. Transaction fees apply to completed trades. Prices are in USD.

tiers.name: Observer
tiers.tagline: Watch the market. No commitment required.
tiers.priceNote: Read-only access — no credit card required
features: Public API endpoints (market data only, 1,000 calls/day)

tiers.name: Trader
tiers.tagline: Full market participation with real-time metering.
tiers.priceNote: per month + 0.5% transaction fee on completed trades
features: Real-time volume, trade history, and order book depth
Webhook notifications for trades and alerts

tiers.name: Exchange Pro
tiers.tagline: Institutional exchange access with custom settlement.
tiers.priceNote: per month + 0.5% transaction fee (negotiable on volume)

limits.marketAccess: Full access + early access to new markets
limits.apiAccess: Exchange Pro API (unlimited, dedicated rate pools)
limits.dataExport: Full history (JSON, CSV, Parquet), real-time stream

features: Unlimited trade execution across all markets
Bulk lot discounts (5% on lots > 1M HC, 10% on lots > 10M HC)
Negotiated transaction fee rates at volume thresholds
Custom settlement terms (weekly, bi-monthly, or custom cycle)
Exchange Pro API (unlimited calls, dedicated IP pools)
Full historical data export (JSON, CSV, Apache Parquet)
Real-time trade event stream via WebSocket
Webhook integrations for ERP/accounting system automation
RBAC for team members (view, trade, admin roles)
Custom spend caps and automated stop-buy rules
Smart contract access when available (early access)

feeSchedule.title: Transaction Fee Schedule
feeSchedule.note: Fees apply to the buyer on completed trades. Sellers receive 100% of the listed price minus the seller listing fee (0.25% for Trader, 0.1% for Exchange Pro).
